item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min "It was a really frustrating game for me and Cammy. I'm sorry because you lot [the fans] deserv
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min "It was a really frustrating game for me and Cammy. I'm sorry because you lot [the fans] deserve a lot better than how we've just played there."
Ross Smith fired in six maximums and averaged just shy of 97 in a 6-3 victory over Cameron Menzies.
Smudger will face Josh Rock in Mostrar más 53

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 4min SMUDGER POWERS THROUGH!
What a start to the evening session here in Sindelfingen, as Ross
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 4min SMUDGER POWERS THROUGH!
What a start to the evening session here in Sindelfingen, as Ross Smith powers past Cameron Menzies, beating the Scot 6-3!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 1 13 2 mil

item.title: PDCResults: PDCResults @PDCResults · 6min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Last 32, Ross Smith (96.90) 6 (11)
item.description: PDCResults @PDCResults · 6min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Last 32, Ross Smith (96.90) 6 (11) 3 (91.43) Cameron Menzies 122

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 9min Just watched the first half of Tottenham v Brighton with John Parrott. That man know
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 9min Just watched the first half of Tottenham v Brighton with John Parrott. That man knows his stuff. Talked about Everton turning United over 5-0 in the autumn of 84. One of the best teams I've ever known in English football, that Everton side. I can still name every player. 160

item.title: TheConnorCain: Connor Cain @TheConnorCain · 16min What a hit from Mitoma 1 79

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 21min A Mark Williams special!
A great pot means he takes a 6-3 lead into Sunday’s second session
#Wo

WST @WeAreWST · 21min A Mark Williams special!
